title: Fix assignments of concatenation to queue and dyn array
body:
Currently on master, assignments to queues and dynamic arrays of form `a = {b}` don't work. A compilation error is thrown, because a queue is passed to the function that expects an element as argument.
```
./Vt_queue_concat_assign___024root__DepSet_hbe0919cb__0__Slow.cpp:41:66: error: no viable conversion from 'VlQueue<CData>' (aka 'VlQueue<unsigned char>') to 'const unsigned char'
    t__DOT__unnamedblk1__DOT__q2 = VlQueue<CData/*0:0*/>::consVC(t__DOT__unnamedblk1__DOT__q1, 
                                                                 ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
/path/verilator/test_regress/../include/verilated_types.h:532:42: note: passing argument to parameter 'lhs' here
    static VlQueue consVC(const T_Value& lhs, const VlQueue& rhs) {
                                         ^
1 error generated.
```
This PR fixes it.
